title: Cuneiform Tablet #0459: Old Assyrian Census
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a census document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a census document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Census document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records census matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
